cheque_bounce_138.summary: A cheque issued to repay a personal/friendly hand loan was dishonoured.
A buyer's cheque against a supplier's invoice for goods was dishonoured.
A tenant's cheque covering accumulated rent arrears bounced.
A landlord's cheque refunding the security deposit after vacating bounced.
An employer's cheque for unpaid salary / full-and-final settlement was dishonoured.
A seller's cheque refunding token/advance money for a cancelled property deal bounced.
A client's cheque for completed freelance/professional services was dishonoured.
The buyer's cheque for the balance price of a used vehicle bounced.
A cheque paying a contractor for completed civil/renovation work was dishonoured.
An institute's refund cheque after a withdrawn admission bounced.
A consolidated cheque towards instalments owed to a private lender was dishonoured.
A settlement cheque on exit from a small business arrangement bounced.
A cheque against goods supplied on credit to a retail shop was dishonoured.
A cheque for the balance payment of purchased machinery/equipment bounced.
